title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, shares his approach to building successful companies. He emphasizes focus and avoiding duplication of existing solutions rather than pursuing raw technical advantages like larger models or better fundraising decks.
